pull-request-header:
## Release checklist

- [ ] Fix any deprecation deadlines if they exist
- [ ] Verify integration tests pass (triggered by the `integration-test` label)
- [ ] Verify behavior tests pass (triggered by the `behavior-test` label)
- [ ] Verify example checks pass (triggered by the `test-examples` label)
- [ ] Run evaluation on OpenHands Index
- [ ] Confirm any merged `release-note-required` PRs are accurately called out in the final release notes
- [ ] Review and approve the PR
